body: Applying `import CompatDevTools; CompatDevTools.synchronize_compats(".")` revealed several inconsistent compat entries. This PR fixes them. I haven't updated the required julia version because the only dependency that now requires 1.7 is KernelAbstractions.jl, which is only needed for CPU/GPU error printing. So, I've left it alone for now.
title: Synchronize compat entries
